race.description: Bodalla Pub "Best Pub In Bodalla" Super Mdn Plate
race.comment: MASTER JOHNNY (4) is a three-start Maiden who will find this much easier. Raced on the speed before tiring in the straight to finish fifth over 1500m at Hawkesbury. Can take control early and prove hard to get past in this weaker contest. ICONIC REWARD (11) strengthened over the break and a win looks imminent. Up sharply in trip at her second run back with a narrow third over 1425m at this track. Gets a similar setup for this and no shock to see her put these away. MONTE BRAVEHEART (5) had mixed success in his two runs this prep but can't draw a decent gate. Went back second-up and chipped away with the 59kg for a disappointing fifth over 1280m at Canberra Acton. Likely to go back and be ridden for luck. GLENN'S LEGACY (1) is progressing well this time and is ready for the 1435m fourth-up. Gripped on late after stalking the speed for a tough third over 1200m here. No excuses today.
